feed.title: App Store Discounts（TR）
feed.subtitle: App Store Discounts - Made with love by appstore-discounts(https://github.com/appstore-discounts/appstore-discounts) feedId:99063474310237184+userId:73658201673997312 feedId:157008924688563200+userId:73658201673997312

entry.title: 🎉 Welcome to subscribe to App Store Discounts
entry.summary: Thank you for subscribing to our RSS feed. We are a community-driven project dedicated to bringing the latest App Store discount information to users worldwide. Our goal is to ensure that every user can stay up-to-date with the promotional activities of their favorite apps, whether it's price reductions on the apps themselves or limited-time promotions for in-app purchases. We will cover them all for you!
entry.content:
Thank you for subscribing to our RSS feed. We are a community-driven project dedicated to bringing the latest App Store discount information to users worldwide. Our goal is to ensure that every user can stay up-to-date with the promotional activities of their favorite apps, whether it's price reductions on the apps themselves or limited-time promotions for in-app purchases. We will cover them all for you!

About our RSS feed

  • Focused on delivering App Store app discount information
  • Whenever an app's price drops or in-app purchases go on sale, we will promptly send you a notification
  • Each app's discount information is presented in a separate feed
  • The RSS feed is completely open-source, allowing you to view, contribute, and add your favorite apps at any time

Find Us

App Store Discounts

Finally

If this project has been helpful to you, would you kindly give us a ⭐️

Country or Region Tracked

Statistics of the Number of App Tracked

Category Total Apps Artificially Added Automatically Added Prohibit Push
All 2131 201 1930 99
TR 1975 172 1803 83

View All Apps

Ranking of App Discounts This Month(TR)

Since it supports applications that automatically add tracking based on paid application rankings, most applications are now automatically added, and the quality of the application is unknown and uncontrollable. The current ranking will be used as a reference for subsequent disabling push.

entry.title: Halls of Torment: Premium
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺249,99 → ₺149,99 [₺129,99 ~ ₺249,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺149,99

In-App Purchases

  • Supporter Pack：₺49,99
  • The Boglands DLC：₺149,99

Application Description

Halls of Torment is a horde survival game with a pre-rendered retro look reminiscent of RPGs from the late 90s. Choose one of many hero characters and descend into the deadly Halls of Torment. Fight unholy horrors from beyond and survive wave after wave of enemies until you face one of the tormented Lords. Strengthen your hero with character traits, abilities, and items. Create a new powerful build during each run. Explore various underground expanses and find new powerful items that enable you to venture even deeper into the abyss. First available on Steam, the 90's-style RPG survival roguelike, Halls of Torment, is now making its debut on mobile! 【Features】 ◆ Quick and casual 30 minute runs ◆ Old school pre-rendered art style ◆ Quest-based meta progression ◆ Large selection of diverse abilities, traits, and items, all enabling you to create interesting synergies ◆ Diverse bosses featuring unique mechanics and attack patterns ◆ Several distinct characters allowing for many different play styles ◆ Unlock and explore multiple interesting and challenging underground worlds ◆ Unique items can be sent up to the overworld and used to customize future runs ◆ Craft magical tinctures to direct fate in your favor ◆ Unlock the power of each class and combine them with your chosen character ◆ Find rare item variants to further improve your builds 【Full Content List】 ◆6 stages with unique environments ◆13 playable characters & character marks ◆20+ blessings that make you stronger for each run ◆80+ unique items to retrieve and unlock ◆240 higher rarity item variants ◆80+ abilities and ability upgrades ◆40+ artifacts to customize your game experience ◆35+ unique bosses ◆70+ unique monsters ◆500 quests to complete ◆1000+ traits that upgrade characters and abilities Our content list is still growing, expect more in the future! 【Contact Us】 Discord: @Erabit or join via https://discord.gg/Gkje2gzCqB Email: prglobal@erabitstudios.com

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

All Price Information

Price：Free

In-App Purchases

  • Premium：₺99,99

Application Description

Welcome to the Civilopedia for Sid Meier's Civilization V/VI/VII! Here you will find detailed descriptions of all aspects of the game.

entry.title: Auto Redial App
entry.content:
Discount Information

In-App Purchases

  • Premium Lifetime：₺1.299,99 → ₺499,99 [₺399,99 ~ ₺1.499,99]

All Price Information

Price：Free

In-App Purchases

  • Weekly Subscription：₺49,99
  • Premium Lifetime：₺499,99
  • Pro – Lifetime：₺0,00
  • Yearly Subscription：₺249,99

Application Description

With this application, you can make automatic calls to the numbers you want efficiently and in a personalized way. You can define the number of repetitions, the interval between calls, add an extension, activate vibration before dialing, and even schedule your calls using a built-in calendar. Auto Redial App also offers a simple and intuitive interface, detailed call history, and multiple customization options to fit your needs. This application is ideal for anyone who needs to make repetitive calls automatically — such as an appointment call, a busy call retry, or contacting services where the line is busy. Main Features: - Automatically redial busy or unanswered calls. - Set number of retries and time intervals. - Schedule calls in advance via calendar. - Add extensions automatically after dialing. - Enable vibration before each redial. - Call history and retry stats. Perfect for: - Booking appointments (doctors, embassies, etc.) - Customer service or tech support - Calling public offices - Freelancers and business owners following up clients Whether you’re calling to book a doctor’s appointment, reach customer service, or just trying to connect when the line is busy, this app saves time and frustration. Privacy Policy: https://sites.google.com/view/auto-redial-app-rellamadas/pol%C3%ADtica-de-privacidad?pli=1 Terms of Use (EULA): Apple App Store https://www.apple.com/legal/internet-services/itunes/dev/stdeula/

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Dungeon Within
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺299,99 → ₺249,99 [₺249,99 ~ ₺299,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺249,99

In-App Purchases

  • Pioneer of the Abyss：₺499,99
  • Essence of Transcendence：₺1.499,99
  • Underworld Expansion Pass：₺299,99
  • Underworld Pass 1：₺149,99
  • Ark of Eternity：₺1.499,99
  • Time Traveler：₺299,99
  • Essence of the Abyss：₺999,99
  • Essence of Beginning：₺999,99
  • Beginning of the Abyss：₺499,99
  • Beginning of Growth：₺499,99

Application Description

"Reclaim Your Throne as the True Dark Lord!" Awaken as an amnesiac Dark Lord in an endless dream world and construct your own ruthless dungeon. Explore the realm to rally scattered monsters, deploy deadly traps, and bring ruin to insolent invaders. Death is not the end, but the beginning of new power. Through endless roguelike runs, forge your DUNGEON into the ultimate, inescapable fortress! [Design & Defend Your Dungeon] Your strategy becomes the absolute law of the dungeon. Deploy diverse combat rooms, sinister structures, and lethal traps to create the ultimate kill zone for incoming heroes. [Raise a Formidable Monster Army] Explore the world to awaken diverse monsters from their deep slumber. Draft creatures with unique abilities and racial synergies into your ranks, and command the frontline with the ultimate monstrous horde. [Unleash the Dark Lord's Authority] Are the invaders breaching your dungeon's core? Unleash the true power dormant within the Dark Lord. Turn the tide of battle instantly with devastating abilities that will bring arrogant foes to their knees. [Unpredictable Roguelike Encounters] Every run paves a new path. Collect mysterious relics hidden throughout the dungeon, navigate through bizarre unknown events, and empower your forces. Your choices will dictate the fate of the next battle. [Fragments of Memory & True Awakening] Do not stop even if you fall in battle. Gather fragments of lost memories and legacies from past runs to awaken the Dark Lord's true power. Transcend death and reclaim your eternal, absolute authority. Take your rightful place on the throne now and dominate your own grand, brutal dungeon!

entry.title: Lanota - Music game with story
entry.summary:
Price: ₺99,99 → Free
Expansion Chapter O: ₺199,99 → ₺99,99
Expansion Chapter B: ₺199,99 → ₺99,99
Expansion Ch. V: ₺199,99 → ₺99,99
Expansion Ch. U: ₺199,99 → ₺99,99
Expansion Chapter T: ₺199,99 → ₺99,99
Expansion Chapter S: ₺199,99 → ₺99,99
Secret Library Selection 1: ₺199,99 → ₺99,99
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺99,99 → Free [Free ~ ₺99,99]）

In-App Purchases

  • Expansion Chapter O：₺199,99 → ₺99,99 [₺99,99 ~ ₺199,99]
  • Expansion Chapter B：₺199,99 → ₺99,99 [₺99,99 ~ ₺199,99]
  • Expansion Ch. V：₺199,99 → ₺99,99 [₺99,99 ~ ₺199,99]
  • Expansion Ch. U：₺199,99 → ₺99,99 [₺99,99 ~ ₺199,99]
  • Expansion Chapter T：₺199,99 → ₺99,99 [₺99,99 ~ ₺199,99]
  • Expansion Chapter S：₺199,99 → ₺99,99 [₺99,99 ~ ₺199,99]
  • Secret Library Selection 1：₺199,99 → ₺99,99 [₺99,99 ~ ₺199,99]

All Price Information

Price：Free

In-App Purchases

  • Platinum Plan - Monthly：₺30,99
  • Platinum Plan - Trimonthly：₺82,99
  • Small bottle of Chiming Core：₺49,99
  • Expansion Chapter O：₺99,99
  • Expansion Chapter B：₺99,99
  • Expansion Ch. V：₺99,99
  • Expansion Ch. U：₺99,99
  • Expansion Chapter T：₺99,99
  • Expansion Chapter S：₺99,99
  • Secret Library Selection 1：₺99,99

Application Description

Save the world by the power of music in this dynamic & refreshing rhythm game! Play the tunes and follow the rhythm, explore and revive the world. Unlock music of various genres, conquer specially designed boss-stages, and indulge in an artistic picture book! AWARDS & ACHIEVEMENTS 2016 1st IMGA SEA “Excellence in Audio” 2017 Taipei Game Show Indie Game Award “Best Audio” 2017 13th IMGA Global Nominee 2017 Indie Prize Award in Casual Connect Asia “Best Mobile Game” Nominee FEATURES >> Innovative and Dynamic Rhythm Game Not the rhythm game you used to know: we add unique animation to the plate you'll be playing on. Dozens of fantastic music tracks and amazing boss-stage features, different charts and challenges; gentle or intense, beginners, advanced players and experts can all have their game! >> Artistic and Refreshing Picture Book "I trust that you, the one blessed by the gods of melody, can surely revive the former world order." "Tune" the chaotic energy back to harmony, and the world will gradually reveal. Explore places on the map, read a beautifully handcrafted picture book, and collect items on the way as souvenir! >> Achievement, Leaderboard, and More Collect achievements as the story progress, share your results to friends, and compete with other players on the leaderboard. Supports cloud save. LINKS Official site https://noxygames.com/lanota/ Privacy Policy & Terms of Use https://noxygames.com/lanota/privacy.html Twitter https://twitter.com/Noxy_Lanota_EN/ Facebook https://www.facebook.com/lanota/ Discord Server https://discord.gg/lanota

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Vintage Camera - Goodak
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺149,99 → ₺99,99 [₺29,99 ~ ₺149,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺99,99

In-App Purchases

  • Design Frame Package：₺49,99
  • Social Frame Package：₺49,99
  • Magazine Frame Package：₺49,99
  • Black Frame Pack：₺49,99
  • Geometric Frame Pack：₺49,99
  • Stamp Frame Pack：₺49,99
  • Retro Frame Pack：₺49,99
  • Stroke Frame Pack：₺49,99
  • Color Frame Pack：₺49,99
  • Upgrade Deluxe Edition：₺299,99

Application Description

Some moments may have slipped away in our life, but will last forever in our memory, Now you can turn iPhone into a vintage disposable camera, so that you take each photo looks so unique, full of charm and moving, Goodak® lets you express even the most subtle mood on your photos. + CLASSIC DISPOSABLE CAMERA + Enhance your images with random films. + Photo album import feature. + Dynamic photo albums selection. + Other adjustable edit function. + Automatically load date watermark. + Random film photographic lens. + Custom Date (Recall Past). + Black & white and Lomo cameras. + Viewfinder Switching Function. Goodak is provided as Goodak Studio® own product. Thanks for using! We're working on new features and constantly working to improve your experience! If you have any questions or feedback, please contact us: http://www.psdc.com.tw DISCLAIMER NOTICE Goodak is provided as Goodak Studio own product. this app is not the official app of Kodak and Fuji or any others. Goodak made every effort to ensure not to infringe other's copyrights or trademarks.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

entry.title: Wipr 2
entry.content:
Discount Information

In-App Purchases

  • Filtr：₺149,99 → ₺29,99 [₺29,99 ~ ₺1.299,99]

All Price Information

Price：₺249,99

In-App Purchases

  • Filtr：₺29,99
  • Tip：₺249,99
  • Yearly Recurring Tip：₺399,99
  • Monthly Recurring Tip：₺79,99
  • Mega Tip：₺999,99

Application Description

Wipr blocks ads, popups, trackers, cookie warnings, and other nasty things that make the web slow and ugly. Websites in Safari will look clean, load fast, and stop invisibly tracking you. You’ll notice significant improvements to your battery life and data usage. Setup is a snap. The Filtr add-on extends Wipr’s blocking to all apps on your device. It acts at the network level, but unlike a VPN, it can access none of your data, and can be used in conjunction with VPNs, iCloud Private Relay, and custom DNS. Wipr’s blocklist is updated twice a week automatically, and has enhanced versions for the following languages: Bosnian, Chinese, Croatian, Czech, Danish, Dutch, Estonian, Finnish, French, German, Greek, Hebrew, Hindi, Hungarian, Icelandic, Indonesian, Italian, Japanese, Korean, Macedonian, Malay, Montenegrin, Norwegian, Polish, Romanian, Russian, Serbian, Slovak, Spanish, Thai, and Vietnamese. Wipr is a universal app: install it on all your devices (iPhone, iPad, Mac, Vision Pro) with a single purchase. It’s fully accessible with VoiceOver, Voice Control, and more. Dark, Tinted, and Clear icon variants are included. Family Sharing is supported. Because it’s developed by a single independent developer and 100% funded by its users, Wipr only answers to you: no one can pay to have their ads unblocked, and there are no “acceptable ads”. This app was made with love and patience. I hope you’ll enjoy using it as much as I enjoyed designing and building it. – Kaylee Terms & Conditions: https://kaylees.site/terms-and-conditions.html EULA: https://www.apple.com/legal/internet-services/itunes/dev/stdeula/
